---
title: "Índice de contribuciones"
listing:
  - id: todas-las-charlas
    type: table
    categories: true
    contents:
      - sesiones-paralelas/sesion-*/charla-*/index.qmd
      - sesiones-especiales/charla-*/index.qmd
    fields: [categories, title, author]
    field-display-names:
      categories: "Sesión"
      author: "Autor(es)"
    sort: "categories"
    sort-ui: [categories, title, author]
    filter-ui: [categories, title, author]
    page-size: 50
---

::: {#todas-las-charlas}
:::
